subcodes.first_line: The glances of Divine favors have been directed towards thee from the Dawning-Place of heavenly verses, and, God willing, shall continue thus [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لحظات الطاف الهیه از مشرق آیات ربانیه بانجناب متوجه بوده و انشاء الله خواهد
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @oneness; unity of religion
